title.en: China-to-Peru Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入秘鲁：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入秘魯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Peru INACAL NTP-IEC 62109 safety, Osinergmin and MINEM grid-connection and RER renewable-energy requirements, 60 Hz grid revalidation, and GB/T baseline gaps.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国光伏逆变器文件与秘鲁INACAL NTP-IEC 62109安全、Osinergmin及MINEM并网和RER可再生能源要求、60 Hz电网重新验证以及GB/T基线差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國光伏逆變器文件與秘魯INACAL NTP-IEC 62109安全、Osinergmin及MINEM併網和RER可再生能源要求、60 Hz電網重新驗證以及GB/T基線差距對照。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Peru, the key requirements are: (1) NTP-IEC 62109-1:2024 and NTP-IEC 62109-2:2024 safety conformity adopted by INACAL Directoral Resolution No. 035-2024-INACAL/DN; (2) grid-connection settings revalidated for Peru's 60 Hz, 220/380 V system under NTCSE (DS 020-97-EM) and COES/SEIN technical requirements; (3) MINEM/Osinergmin registration or technical approval for projects under the RER renewable energy concession regime. China-market GB/T 19964 and NB/T 32004 documents do not cover Peru's 60 Hz settings or INACAL NTP safety scope.
answer_first.zh: 中国光伏逆变器出口秘鲁的主要要求：（1）INACAL第035-2024-INACAL/DN号局长令采用的NTP-IEC 62109-1:2024和NTP-IEC 62109-2:2024安全符合性；（2）按秘鲁60 Hz、220/380 V系统重新验证电网设置，依据NTCSE（DS 020-97-EM）及COES/SEIN技术要求；（3）在RER可再生能源特许权制度下，向MINEM/Osinergmin进行项目注册或技术审批。中国市场GB/T 19964和NB/T 32004文件不涵盖秘鲁60 Hz设置或INACAL NTP安全范围。
answer_first.zht: 中國光伏逆變器出口秘魯的主要要求：（1）INACAL第035-2024-INACAL/DN號局長令採用的NTP-IEC 62109-1:2024和NTP-IEC 62109-2:2024安全符合性；（2）按秘魯60 Hz、220/380 V系統重新驗證電網設置，依據NTCSE（DS 020-97-EM）及COES/SEIN技術要求；（3）在RER可再生能源特許權制度下，向MINEM/Osinergmin進行項目登記或技術審批。中國市場GB/T 19964和NB/T 32004文件不涵蓋秘魯60 Hz設置或INACAL NTP安全範圍。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, INACAL conformity determination, Osinergmin grid-connection approval, MINEM concession determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Peru INACAL, Osinergmin, MINEM, COES, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、INACAL合规认定、Osinergmin并网批准、MINEM特许权裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行秘鲁INACAL、Osinergmin、MINEM、COES及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、INACAL合規認定、Osinergmin併網批准、MINEM特許權裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行秘魯INACAL、Osinergmin、MINEM、COES及海關要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
